Physical Activity and Nutrition Program
Physical Activity and Nutrition Program
Please note: Due to recent changes in federal funding, Humboldt County Public Health will no longer be able to provide Physical Activity and Nutrition education in local schools or through community programs. This includes Safe Routes to Schools, Rethink Your Drink, falls prevention classes for older adults, and other efforts that have supported healthier choices and safer, more active lives for our community.
We are deeply grateful to the schools, community partners and residents who have worked alongside us to promote health and wellness through CalFresh Healthy Living. Though this chapter is ending, we remain committed to finding new ways to support the well-being of Humboldt County residents.
